label: Head type
description: Defines a pawn head mesh/texture shape, gender restriction, render offsets, and optional gene requirements.

graphicPath.label: Graphic path
graphicPath.description: Content-relative path to the head texture, without directional suffix. The game appends _south, _east, etc. at runtime.

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: Gender restriction for this head type. None means any gender can use it.

narrow.label: Narrow
narrow.description: If true, this head is narrow-shaped. Beard render offsets from BeardDef.offsetNarrowEast and offsetNarrowSouth are applied instead of the standard offsets.

hairMeshSize.label: Hair mesh size
hairMeshSize.description: Scale of the hair mesh rendered on top of this head. Format: (x, y).

beardMeshSize.label: Beard mesh size
beardMeshSize.description: Scale of the beard mesh rendered on this head. Format: (x, y).

beardOffset.label: Beard offset
beardOffset.description: World-space render offset applied to the beard mesh. Format: (x, y, z).

eyeOffsetEastWest.label: Eye offset east/west
eyeOffsetEastWest.description: World-space render offset applied to the eyes when facing east or west. Absent means no override is applied.

beardOffsetXEast.label: Beard offset X east
beardOffsetXEast.description: Additional horizontal offset applied to the beard when the pawn faces east. West-facing pawns mirror this value.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Relative probability that this head type is chosen during random pawn generation. Higher values increase the chance.

randomChosen.label: Random chosen
randomChosen.description: If true, this head type is eligible for random pawn generation. Set to false to restrict it to gene or backstory requirements only.

requiredGenes.label: Required genes
requiredGenes.description: GeneDefs that a pawn must possess for this head type to be assigned. Used for gene-restricted head shapes such as skulls or stumps.

basic-head-type.label: Basic head type
basic-head-type.description: Standard head type with a texture path and optional gender restriction.

gene-required-head-type.label: Gene-required head type
gene-required-head-type.description: Head type restricted to pawns that carry specific genes, such as special mutant head shapes.

abstract-head-base.label: Abstract head base
abstract-head-base.description: Abstract XML inheritance base for head types that share mesh sizes and render offsets.
